name: Python计算
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'print(2**10)'
expected: 应该输出 1024

name: Python JSON
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"a":1}))'
expected: 应该输出 JSON 格式的字符串，包含键 a 和值 1

name: Python列表
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'print([x*2 for x in range(5)])'

name: requests库-GET
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import requests; r=requests.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); print(r.status_code)'
expected: HTTP GET 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: requests库-POST
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import requests; r=requests.post("http://httpbin.org/post", json={"key":"value"}); print(r.json()["json"]["key"])'
expected: POST 请求应该返回 JSON 中的 key 字段值 value

name: BeautifulSoup解析
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'from bs4 import BeautifulSoup; html="

test

"; soup=BeautifulSoup(html,"html.parser"); print(soup.p.text)'
expected: 应该解析 HTML 并提取 p 标签的文本内容 test

name: pandas创建DataFrame
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import pandas as pd; df=pd.DataFrame({"a":[1,2,3]}); print(len(df))'
expected: 应该创建 DataFrame 并返回长度 3

name: numpy数组操作
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import numpy as np; arr=np.array([1,2,3]); print(arr.sum())'
expected: 应该对数组求和得到 6

name: datetime处理
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from datetime import datetime; print(datetime.now().year)'
expected: 应该输出当前年份（202x）

name: re正则匹配
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import re; print(re.findall(r"\d+", "abc123def456"))'
expected: 应该匹配出所有数字 ['123', '456']

name: pathlib路径
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path("/workspace"); print(p.name)'
expected: 应该提取路径的最后一部分 workspace

name: 多行函数定义
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'def fib(n):
    if n <= 1: return n
    return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
print(fib(10))'

name: 类定义和使用
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'class Point:
    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.x = x
        self.y = y
    def distance(self):
        return (self.x**2 + self.y**2)**0.5
p = Point(3, 4)
print(int(p.distance()))'
expected: 应该计算点到原点的距离为 5

name: 异常处理
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'try:
    x = 1 / 0
except ZeroDivisionError:
    print("caught")'
expected: 应该捕获异常并输出 caught

name: 上下文管理器
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'with open("/workspace/test.txt", "w") as f:
    f.write("hello")
with open("/workspace/test.txt") as f:
    print(f.read())'
expected: 应该成功写入并读取文件内容 hello

name: httpx同步请求
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import httpx; r=httpx.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); print(r.status_code)'
expected: HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: httpx异步请求
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import asyncio, httpx; async def f(): async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c: r=await c.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); return r.status_code; print(asyncio.run(f()))'
expected: 异步 HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: pydantic模型验证
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pydantic import BaseModel; class User(BaseModel): name: str; age: int; u=User(name="test", age=25); print(u.age)'
expected: 应该验证模型并返回 age 字段值 25

name: pydantic类型错误
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError; class User(BaseModel): age: int; try: User(age="abc"); except ValidationError: print("error")'
expected: 应该捕获验证错误并输出 error

name: aiohttp客户端
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import asyncio, aiohttp; async def f(): async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as s: async with s.get("http://httpbin.org/get") as r: return r.status; print(asyncio.run(f()))'
expected: 异步 HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: fastapi路由定义
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from fastapi import FastAPI; app=FastAPI(); @app.get("/"); def read_root(): return {"Hello": "World"}; print(read_root())'
expected: 应该返回字典包含 Hello 键

name: typer CLI
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import typer; app=typer.Typer(); @app.command(); def hello(name: str = "World"): print(f"Hello {name}"); hello()'
expected: 应该输出 Hello World

name: rich格式化
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from rich.console import Console; c=Console(); c.print("[bold]test[/bold]", end="")'
expected: 应该输出格式化文本包含 test

name: subprocess执行命令
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(["echo","test"], capture_output=True, text=True); print(r.stdout.strip())'
expected: 应该执行 echo 命令并返回 test

name: os文件操作
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import os; os.makedirs("/workspace/test", exist_ok=True); print(os.path.exists("/workspace/test"))'
expected: 应该创建目录并返回 True

name: shutil文件复制
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import shutil; open("/workspace/a.txt","w").write("test"); shutil.copy("/workspace/a.txt","/workspace/b.txt"); print(open("/workspace/b.txt").read())'
expected: 应该复制文件并读取内容 test

name: glob文件匹配
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import glob; open("/workspace/test.txt","w"); print(len(glob.glob("/workspace/*.txt")))'
expected: 应该匹配到 1 个 txt 文件

name: tempfile临时文件
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import tempfile; with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",delete=False) as f: f.write("test"); print("ok")'
expected: 应该创建临时文件并输出 ok

name: hashlib MD5
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import hashlib; print(hashlib.md5(b"test").hexdigest())'
expected: 应该计算 MD5 哈希值 098f6bcd4621d373cade4e832627b4f6

name: base64编解码
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import base64; encoded=base64.b64encode(b"test"); print(base64.b64decode(encoded).decode())'
expected: 应该编码后解码得到原始字符串 test

name: urllib解析URL
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from urllib.parse import urlparse; u=urlparse("http://example.com/path?q=1"); print(u.netloc)'
expected: 应该解析 URL 并提取域名 example.com

name: sqlite3数据库
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect(":memory:"); c=conn.cursor(); c.execute("CREATE TABLE t(id INT)"); c.execute("INSERT INTO t VALUES(1)"); print(c.execute("SELECT * FROM t").fetchone()[0])'
expected: 应该创建表、插入数据并查询返回 1

name: csv文件读写
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import csv; with open("/workspace/t.csv","w",newline="") as f: csv.writer(f).writerow(["a","b"]); with open("/workspace/t.csv") as f: print(csv.reader(f).__next__()[0])'
expected: 应该写入 CSV 并读取第一列值 a

name: yaml解析
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import yaml; data=yaml.safe_load("key: value"); print(data["key"])'
expected: 应该解析 YAML 并返回 key 的值 value

name: toml解析
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import tomli; data=tomli.loads("key = \"value\""); print(data["key"])'
expected: 应该解析 TOML 并返回 key 的值 value
